name: Pot Roast Tri-Tip
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the meat dry, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the oil in a large flame-proof casserole dish.
3. Add the meat and brown on both sides over high heat.
4. Remove the meat from the pot.
5. Reduce the heat to medium and add onions, carrots, and celery; cook, stirring, for five minutes.
6. Stir in the flour, then add the wine and broth.
7. Replace the meat in the casserole.
8. Add the thyme, cover, and cook over low heat until the meat is tender (about one hour).
9. When the meat is tender, remove it from the pot.
10. Strain the sauce.
11. Discard the vegetables.
12. Slice the meat and arrange on a platter.
13. Serve the sauce separately.
